title: Baker Ross CBS023 Mermaid Arts and Crafts Pack for Kids - Two Fun Mermaid Themed Creative Kits, Stickers and Activity Book for Boys and Girls, Assorted
features: Arts and Crafts Pack: Craft-It! BOX offers unique craft kits for 3-9-year-olds, packed with fun and imaginative projects. Each box includes educational activities to keep kids entertained for hours.

Fun and Educational: Baker Ross's craft pack, is full of creative, inspirational themed crafts to expand imagination and develop key skills. The mermaid themed crafts and activity book help kids use their imagination
Quality and Value: This pack has easy-to-follow craft activities for kids of all ages. There are a range of mermaid-themed craft projects, stickers, and an activity book.
Included in the Pack: Pack Contents: 3 x Mermaid Door Kits. 3 x Mermaid Sequin Picture Kits. 1 x Mermaid themed Sticker Sheet. 1 x 16-page Activity Book, and a colorable and decoratable box.
Made by Experts: Baker Ross has been designing arts and crafts supplies for over 40 years. All products conform to General Product Safety Regulations, and state age recommendation where applicable.
description: From the manufacturer Mermaid Craft-It Box Treat your child to a creative adventure! Craft-it! BOX is the latest concept to be launched by arts and crafts experts Baker Ross. Packed with unique craft kits and fun activities, the Craft It! BOX brings imaginative, high quality craft projects to children ages 3-9 years, all designed to help develop key skills and make crafting fun! Guaranteed to keep a child entertained for hours, it’s the perfect solution for busy parents, home schooling and makes a rewarding present from grandparents and family members. The latest Craft-It! BOX celebrates the lives of Mermaids. Inside are two craft activities, one for creating 3 Mermaid Sequin Picture Kits, and the other to create 3 Mermaid Door Kits. These multiple craft activities can be shared by siblings and gifted to family members to show off their crafty expertise. There’s also a sticker sheet, and an educational booklet packed with puzzles, games and fun activities all about mermaids, including a recipe for clam cookies for the kids to show off their baking and decorating skills! Mermaid Sequin Picture Kits – AT732 Create your own underwater kingdoms with these stunning, sparkling Mermaid Sequin Picture Kits!Take a peek inside the everyday lives of mermaids with these incredible art sets. The vibrantly coloured card templates are self-adhesive meaning little ones can easily stick on the sequins included in the pack to create shining detail. Fixing on the sequins is great for hand eye co-ordination too – sea-sational! Peel, stick, sparkle, shine! Mermaid Door Kits – AW609 These so-fish-ticated hideaways are really some-fin else! Intrepid adventurers with magic in mind will be keen to explore the mermaid door - we wonder what they’ll find! After all, the deep blue sea is still a mystery, there are so many wondrous plants and exotic beasts. Now you can discover where the mermaids live - a secret lair, so do take care - come on, let’s begin! Crafty kids will enjoy peeling and sticking the pre-cut foam pieces to create the sparkly shells, decorating with a treasure trove of stickers and personalising them as well... Decorate and explore the mermaid door! Activity Book and Stickers! Exclusively designed by the Baker Ross team, the mermaid activity book is crammed with cool puzzles including a crossword and quiz, colour-in pictures, interesting fun activities all about mermaids, and a clam cookie recipe. The mermaid-themed sticker sheet can be used to decorate any other craft projects. Learning has never been so much fun! Our story We are a family owned and run company since 1974 whose innovative ideas have led us to become one of the leading suppliers of arts and crafts to schools, playgroups and organisations in the UK and internationally. We also offer an extensive range of great value fun toys for party bags and gifts. We educate We develop products that are both creative and fun to stimulate the imagination and enhance learning. We offer hundreds of imaginative kits you haven’t seen before, to help develop key skills from the latest trends in crafts and themes. Quality and value We create great value products that make a difference and that everyone loves, and reward customer loyalty and satisfaction by great service. We intend to be the best at what we do, not the biggest. We deliver inspiration We do not just despatch parcels, we deliver inspiration! Over 75% of our product range is exclusive to us, designed by our in-house team who are constantly developing and producing exciting new themes for kids, big and small.
